supersedes: gtcx-infra-canonical-v1 (CR subtracted external gap from IR — retired)

internalEngineeringReadiness.label: Internal Engineering Readiness
internalEngineeringReadiness.description: Repo-controlled engineering only: code, CI gates, tests, structural ops automation (scripts exist in-repo). Does NOT include legal sign-off, pilot owners, or pen-test vendors.

externalClearance.label: External / GTM Clearance
externalClearance.description: Separate track for human/legal/operator dependencies (EXT-INF register). XC = 10 − externalBlockerBurden. Never subtract from IR.

retiredHeadlineScores.certifiedReadiness: Do not use. Was IR − external gap; split into IR + XC in v2.
retiredHeadlineScores.composite: Deprecated alias. Use internalEngineeringReadiness for engineering; XC for external.

internalDimensions.description: Tests, coverage gates, type safety, gateway/replay hardening
Auth boundaries, policies, dependency audit, Kyverno (in-repo)
Cross-repo contract tests, shared CI wiring (in-repo)
Agent gates, eval pipeline, validate-all wiring (SIGNAL reported separately)
In-repo structural ops: DR script, release-evidence gates, soak baseline — not live operator execution

items.label: Recurring WORM upload on main merge

supplementaryMetrics.label: SIGNAL scorecard
supplementaryMetrics.note: Supplementary only; not IR or XC.

rules: Two independent headline scores: IR (engineering) and XC (external/GTM clearance).
Never compute IR − external gap. Never call IR 'certified' or 'auditor sign-off'.
Full audits MUST run compute-audit-scores.mjs and paste both score blocks.
Phase audits use Strong/Good/Pass — no ad-hoc X/10 except IR/XC from calculator.
GTM stage labels (S0–S6) are not substitute scores for XC.
IR changes via ledger dimension history or ci-snapshot penalties only.
XC changes when externalBlockers[].status flips to done in scoring-rubric.json (sync with EXT-INF register).
